tests.test_name: Playwright - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a single Playwright test fixture and verifies that the documentation panel populates and the downloaded JSON is a valid, fully-resolved Playwright output containing at least one named test.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Playwright - PO - single test, core output structure
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'playwright' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'playwright_single_sample.spec.ts', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'playwright', contains 1+ tests, and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Playwright - PO - test.each expands one test per row
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a data-driven Playwright fixture using test.each and verifies that each data row is expanded into its own separate test entry in the JSON output.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Playwright - PO - test.each expands one test per row
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'playwright' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'playwright_datadriven_sample.spec.ts', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'playwright', contains 2+ tests (one per data row), and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Playwright - PO - for...of expands one test per row
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a Playwright fixture using a for...of loop and verifies that each loop iteration is expanded into its own separate test entry in the JSON output.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Playwright - PO - for...of expands one test per row
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'playwright' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'playwright_forof_sample.spec.ts', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'playwright', contains 3+ tests (one per loop row), and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Playwright - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a single Playwright test fixture and verifies that the JSON output is valid and that the first test entry contains a populated test_coverage_matrix array.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Playwright - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'playwright' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'playwright_single_sample.spec.ts', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'playwright', contains 1+ tests with non-empty test_names, and the first test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a data-driven Playwright fixture using test.each and verifies that the output collapses all rows into a single test entry whose coverage matrix contains one row per data example using the correct Playwright schema.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'playwright' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'playwright_datadriven_sample.spec.ts', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'playwright', contains exactly 1 test with a non-empty test_name, coverage matrix row count matches the data examples, and rows conform to the Playwright coverage matrix schema

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a Playwright fixture using a for...of loop and verifies that the output collapses all iterations into a single test entry whose coverage matrix contains one row per loop iteration using the correct Playwright schema.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'playwright' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'playwright_forof_sample.spec.ts', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'playwright', contains exactly 1 test with a non-empty test_name, coverage matrix row count matches the loop iterations, and rows conform to the Playwright coverage matrix schema
